description: spec/execution-model.md's snapshot rule: preserving alias/cycle topology means an acyclic-but-shared sub-list must render fully at each occurrence, not be collapsed. `:s = (list :a :a)` shares the same `:a` reference at both positions (not two independent copies); `$id`/`$ref` assert both positions resolve to the same underlying reference AND that the harness still requires the full `[1, 2]` shape to match at the `$ref` position (a collapsed/omitted second occurrence would fail shape validation). Issue #495, PR #530.
